  • Uses of PlanningContext in com.google.adk.agents

    Methods in com.google.adk.agents with parameters of type PlanningContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Single<PlannerAction>
    Planner.firstAction(PlanningContext context)
    Select the first action to execute.
    default void
    Planner.init(PlanningContext context)
    Initialize the planner with context and available agents.
    io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Single<PlannerAction>
    Planner.nextAction(PlanningContext context)
    Select the next action based on updated state and events.
